channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Finance Minister Calls on Banks to Support Tanzania Development Vision 2050
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Ambassador Khamis Mussa Omar, Tanzania's Finance Minister, is calling on all banks and financial institutions in the country to actively support the Tanzania Development Vision 2050. S...

item.title: US Continues to Rely on Upgraded B-52 Bombers from the 1960s for Modern Conflicts, Including Strikes on Iran
item.description: The Boeing B-52 Stratofortress, specifically the H model introduced in 1961, remains a cornerstone of the United States Air Force's bomber fleet more than six decades later. With 76 aircraft still in ...

item.title: Western Dedicated Freight Corridor to be fully operational by month end; plans for new Dankuni-Surat corridor underway
item.description: The Western Dedicated Freight Corridor (WDFC) is nearing completion with its final 102-km stretch from Vaitarna to JNPT in Maharashtra expected to start operations by the end of this month. Once this ...

item.title: Celebrities Lella Ford and Karla Estrada comment on Vice Ganda's statement about harmful fan behavior
item.description: In a recent social media discussion, Vice Ganda, a well-known Filipino entertainer, addressed the issue of toxic fandoms and the negative effects they have on celebrities and public discourse. This pr...

item.title: Australian authorities urged to protect Iranian women's football team amid safety fears
item.description: Australian authorities are being urged to provide protection to the Iranian women's football team participating in the Women's Asian Cup, amid fears that players could face severe punishment if they r...

item.title: Etche LGA Chairman Encourages Law Students to Excel and Support Local Development
item.description: The Chairman of Etche Local Government Area, Hon. Chima Boniface Njoku, don advise law students from Etche make dem no slack for their studies and also contribute positively to the growth of their com...

item.title: Democrats Welcome Kristi Noem's Removal as DHS Secretary, Demand Further Changes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced the removal of Kristi Noem from her position as Homeland Security Secretary, appointing Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin as her successor. Democrats expressed strong ...

item.title: West Bengal Police Arrest Two Bangladeshi Nationals in Connection with Activist Sharif Osman Hadi’s Murder
item.description: The West Bengal Police Special Task Force has arrested two Bangladeshi citizens, Rahul alias Faisal Karim Masud and Alamgir Hossain, near the Bongaon border area for illegal entry and stay in India. M...

item.title: Vivian Kenya Explains Her Move from Kenyan Music Fame to Life in the US
item.description: Vivian Kenya, the popular Kenyan singer known for hits like 'Mali' and collaborations with Maina Kinyanjui and Jaguar, stepped away from the spotlight in Kenya to start a new chapter in the United Sta...

item.title: Trump Claims Influence Over Iran's Leadership Following Targeted Airstrike on Khamenei
item.description: On 8 March 2026, former US President Donald Trump stated that Iran's next supreme leader 'will not last long' without approval from the United States. His remarks came a week after the targeted airstr...

item.title: How to Make Maria’s Classic Italian Meatballs
item.description: Maria Clarkson from Casereccio Foods shares her recipe for traditional Italian meatballs, perfect for home cooking. The recipe yields 4–6 servings, producing approximately 25–30 meatballs. The meatbal...

item.title: UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed warns adversaries 'we are no easy prey' amid ongoing regional conflict with Iran
item.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) finds itself drawn into the widening Middle East conflict as tensions escalate between Iran, the United States, and Israel. On March 6, 2026, UAE President Sheikh Mohame...

item.title: Dan Bradbury clinches second Joburg Open after dramatic comeback
item.description: English golfer Dan Bradbury staged a remarkable comeback at the Joburg Open in Houghton on Sunday, coming from five shots behind with ten holes to play to secure his second title at the tournament. Th...

item.title: Public housing tenant in Balga refuses mould remediation access without temporary accommodation amid health concerns
item.description: Laura Western, a mother of two and domestic violence survivor, has been living in a public housing property in Balga, Western Australia, for four years with persistent mould issues. She first reported...

item.title: 11 Common Nigerian Foods That Support Brain Health, Memory, and Focus
item.description: This article talk about how some everyday Nigerian foods fit help to boost brain performance, sharpen memory, improve focus, and keep the mind clear. The writer explain say the brain use plenty energy...

item.title: Port Vale defeats Sunderland 1-0 to reach FA Cup quarter-finals
item.description: Port Vale secured a remarkable 1-0 victory over Sunderland in the FA Cup, reaching the quarter-finals for the first time since 1954. The winning goal was scored by Ben Waine, a 24-year-old New Zealand...

item.title: Middle East conflict escalates, impacting energy markets and causing widespread humanitarian distress
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which began with coordinated US and Israeli air strikes on Iran on 28 February 2026, has escalated into a multi-front regional confrontation. Israeli strikes i...

item.title: NCB dismantles pan-India darknet drug network, seizes LSD, MDMA and other narcotics
item.description: The Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) has successfully dismantled a nationwide drug distribution network operating on the darknet, seizing over 2,000 LSD blotters along with MDMA (ecstasy), charas, amphe...

item.title: PM Shehbaz to unveil government measures for fuel conservation and public relief
item.description: Islamabad: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif is all set to announce a detailed austerity plan on Monday, in response to the ongoing global fuel crisis triggered by the US/Israel-Iran conflict. The governm...

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson honoured at intimate family memorial in Chicago after public tributes from former presidents
item.description: Family members, close allies, and confidants of the late Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. gathered in Chicago on Saturday for a private memorial service at the Rainbow PUSH Coalition headquarters, a day after a...
